description: 62M post-MI on atorvastatin. Established ASCVD triggers secondary-prevention exit. USPSTF primary prevention does not apply.

actions.label: Continue statin therapy (secondary prevention)
actions.rationale: Patient has established ASCVD (prior MI). Already on atorvastatin. Secondary prevention statin therapy should continue per ACC/AHA cholesterol guidelines.

actions.label: Manage per ACC/AHA secondary prevention guidelines
actions.rationale: USPSTF 2022 statin primary prevention does not cover established ASCVD. ACC/AHA 2018 Cholesterol guideline governs secondary prevention LDL targets and statin intensity.

actions.label: Continue blood pressure monitoring
actions.rationale: BP 128/78 on metoprolol is well-controlled post-MI. Continue current regimen.

contraindications.label: Statin initiation for primary prevention
contraindications.rationale: Patient has established ASCVD (prior MI). Primary prevention recommendations do not apply. Should be managed under secondary prevention guidelines.
